features.featureTitle: Fix the video call feature so that the remote party's audio is audible during a call. The VideoCallModal must correctly attach the remote media stream (including audio tracks) to the remote video/audio element so the local user can hear the other person. Ensure the audio element or video element used for remote playback has its srcObject set to the remote stream, is not muted, and that autoPlay is set. Also verify that getUserMedia requests audio: true so the local microphone track is captured and available for the simulated remote audio path.
